name: Low Calorie Seven Layer Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Grated low-fat cheddar or Monterey jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash lettuce or spinach and tear into bite-sized pieces.
Steam peas until just tender.
2. In a large, clear salad bowl, layer the ingredients in the order presented.
Repeat layering until all ingredients are used up, saving the sliced eggs for the top of the salad.
3. Chill the salad.
4. Serve with dressing on the side.
